questions.questionText:
Statement I : The ferromagnetic property depends on temperature. At high temperature, ferromagnet becomes paramagnet.

Statement II : At high temperature, the domain wall area of a ferromagnetic substance increases.

In the light of the above statements, choose the most appropriate answer from the options given below :
options: (A) Statement I is false but Statement II is true
(B) Statement I is true but Statement II is false
(C) Both Statement I and Statement II are false
(D) Both Statement I and Statement II are true
questions.subject: Physics

questions.questionText: If the shortest distance between the straight lines $$3(x - 1) = 6(y - 2) = 2(z - 1)$$ and $$4(x - 2) = 2(y - \lambda ) = (z - 3),\lambda  \in R$$ is $${1 \over {\sqrt {38} }}$$, then the integral value of $$\lambda$$ is equal to :
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText: Let n denote the number of solutions of the equation z<sup>2</sup> + 3$$\overline z $$ = 0, where z is a complex number. Then the value of $$\sum\limits_{k = 0}^\infty  {{1 \over {{n^k}}}} $$ is equal to :
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText: Isotope(s) of hydrogen which emits low energy $$\beta$$<sup>$$-$$</sup> particles with t<sub>1/2</sub> value > 12 years is/are
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.questionText: Four dice are thrown simultaneously and the numbers shown on these dice are recorded in 2 $$\times$$ 2 matrices. The probability that such formed matrix have all different entries and are non-singular, is :
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText: T<sub>0</sub> is the time period of a simple pendulum at a place. if the length of the pendulum is reduced to $${1 \over {16}}$$ times of its initial value, the modified time period is :
questions.subject: Physics

questions.questionText: Let A = [a<sub>ij</sub>] be a real matrix of order 3 $$\times$$ 3, such that a<sub>i1</sub> + a<sub>i2</sub> + a<sub>i3</sub> = 1, for i = 1, 2, 3. Then, the sum of all the entries of the matrix A<sup>3</sup> is equal to :
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText: Let y = y(x) be the solution of the differential equation $$\left( {(x + 2){e^{\left( {{{y + 1} \over {x + 2}}} \right)}} + (y + 1)} \right)dx = (x + 2)dy$$, y(1) = 1. If the domain of y = y(x) is an open interval ($$\alpha$$, $$\beta$$), then | $$\alpha$$ + $$\beta$$| is equal to ______________.
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText:
The motion of a mass on a spring, with spring constant K is as shown in figure.


The equation of motion is given by
x(t) = A sin$$\omega$$t + B cos$$\omega$$t with $$\omega$$ = $$\sqrt {{K \over m}} $$

Suppose that at time t = 0, the position of mass is x(0) and velocity v(0), then its displacement can also be represented as x(t) = C cos($$\omega$$t $$-$$ $$\phi$$), where C and $$\phi$$ are :
questions.subject: Physics

questions.questionText: Methylation of 10 g of benzene gave 9.2 g of toluene. Calculate the percentage yield of toluene __________. (Nearest integer)
questions.subject: Chemistry
Mathematics

questions.questionText: The sum of all the elements in the set {n$$\in$$ {1, 2, ....., 100} | H.C.F. of n and 2040 is 1} is equal to _____________.
questions.subject: Mathematics
